title: How to have multiple teams work in a single board

posts.author: Bastouri (Daniel Bastouri)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,

I’m just following up on a comment I made on another post here, as @JPinBe recommended that this may be a good post for the “Use Cases” category.

Here is a Youtube link to a video I made about how I use the “views” feature along with advanced filters and hidden columns.

I believe the views tool along with advanced filters and hidden columns is a vital part of getting multiple teams to work out of a single board.

If you have multiple teams that you’d like to have work out of a single board, give the video a watch and feel free to get in touch if you have any questions!
